title: Ring Size Calculator - Find Your Ring Size
description: Free ring size calculator. Find your ring size using finger circumference or diameter. Convert between US, EU, UK, and Asian ring sizes.
keywords: ring size calculator, ring size chart, finger circumference, ring size converter, US to EU ring size
intro: Find your ring size by measuring your finger circumference or diameter. Convert between international ring size systems.

faq.q: How do I measure my ring size at home?
faq.a: Wrap a strip of paper around your finger, mark where it overlaps, and measure the length in mm. That's your circumference.

faq.q: What is the average ring size?
faq.a: Average women's ring size is US 6-7 (16.5-17.3mm diameter). Average men's is US 9-10 (19.0-19.8mm diameter).

faq.q: Should I measure at a specific time?
faq.a: Measure in the evening when fingers are largest. Avoid measuring when cold (fingers shrink) or after exercise (fingers swell).
